reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Solo que hice un registro internacional y me dijeron que era sin turno y cuando llegue ahí no querían atenderme porque decían que era con turno.hago nada con el Aca y una vez que lo uso mi experiencia no es buena.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. However, I registered internationally and they told me it was without an appointment, but when I got there they refused to help me because they said it required an appointment. I don't use the ACA system much, and once I do, my experience isn't good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbmRtYUxBEAE
